---
name: Bug report
about: A script does something wrong, crashes, or produces a wrong exclusion list.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
---

## Summary

One sentence: what happened, and what did you expect instead.

## Which script

- [ ] `S1-ExclusionGenerator.ps1` (Windows)
- [ ] `s1_discovery.sh` (Linux)

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS (with version) | e.g. Windows Server 2019 Standard 1809 build 17763 / Ubuntu 22.04.4 |
| Shell version | output of `$PSVersionTable.PSVersion` or `bash --version` |
| Architecture | x64 / arm64 |
| Running elevated / as root | yes / no |
| Script version | from the header: `Version : 2.x` |

2. ...
3. ...
